name: Rajasthan Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Jaipur, Jodhpur, Udaipur, Jaisalmer with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer t
itinerary.description: Delhi: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast, proceed to visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, India Gate, President H
itinerary.description: After breakfast, proceed to visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, India Gate, President House, Humayun Temple, Lotus Temple, Qutub Minar. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Agra (240 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Agra (240 Kms. 3 Hrs.): After breakfast drive to Agra & visit Taj Mahal, Agra Fort & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra to Ranthambore (305 kms
itinerary.description: Agra to Ranthambore (305 kms. 6/7 Hrs.): After breakfast, proceed to Ranthambore, En-Route visit Fatehpur sikri. Overnight stay at the hotel Ranthambore.

itinerary.title: Ranthambore to Udaipur (405 kms
itinerary.description: Ranthambore to Udaipur (405 kms. 7/8 Hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Udaipur, En-Route visit ChittorGarh fort, Overnight stay at the hotel Udaipur.

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast, proceed to Jagdish Temple, City palace, Saheliyo ki Baadi
itinerary.description: Today after breakfast, proceed to Jagdish Temple, City palace, Saheliyo ki Baadi (Princess garden), boat ride at Lake pichola (Own Cost) and overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Udaipur to Jodhpur (260 Kms
itinerary.description: Udaipur to Jodhpur (260 Kms. 5/6 Hrs. approx): Today after breakfast, proceed to Jodhpur & visit Jodhpur fort, Jaswant thada. Overnight stay at the hotel Jodhpur.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur to Jaipur (350 kms
itinerary.description: Jodhpur to Jaipur (350 kms. 6/7 hrs. approx.): Today, after breakfast, proceed to Jaipur, En-Route visit Pushkar and after lunch proceed to Jaipur & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit the ancient capital of Amber, visi
itinerary.description: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit the ancient capital of Amber, visited beautiful Amber Fort, Water Palace, Hawa Mahal (Window Palace), City Place and Observatory (Jantar Mantar), famous block printing & Rajasthani handicraft. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Delhi (260 Kms
itinerary.description:
Jaipur to Delhi (260 Kms. 5/6 Hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Delhi & drop you at Delhi airport/railway station with sweet memories.
Please note: Taj Mahal Close on Every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Breakfast
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour Itinerary
All long distance Travels
Toll Taxes, Parkings, Fuel, State taxes
Comfortable vehicle with experienced driver

itinerary.description: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel. After refreshment a guided tour to visit Red fort, Jama Masjid, India gate, Qutub minar. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.description: Delhi to Agra (230 Kms. 3-4 Hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast proceed to Agra & a guide tour to visit Taj Mahal, Agra Fort, Marble handicrafts. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.description: After breakfast, a guided tour to visit Amber fort, Water Palace, Hawa Mahal (Window Palace), City Place and Observatory (Jantar Mantar) and famous Rajasthani handicraft. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.description: After breakfast, a guided tour to visit City palace, Jagdish temple, Sahelion ki bari (Princess garden) & boat ride at Lake Pichola (direct payment basis). Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.description: Udaipur to Jodhpur (250 Kms. 6/7 Hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast  proceed to Jodhpur & En-Route visit Ranakpur Jain Temple. Overnight stay at the hotel Jodhpur.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer (285 Kms
itinerary.description: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer (285 Kms. 5/6 Hrs. approx.) : After breakfast check out from the hotel & visit Jodhpur Fort, Jaswant Thada & drive to Jaisalmer. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast check out from the hotel & proceed to visit Jaisalmer fort, Jain
itinerary.description: After breakfast check out from the hotel & proceed to visit Jaisalmer fort, Jain Temple, Patwon-ki-haveli & after lunch proceed to sand dunes village resort & enjoy Camel ride, Traditional Rajasthani folk dance. stay at a desert resort.

itinerary.description: Jaisalmer to Bikaner (325 Kms. 6/7 Hrs. approx.) : After breakfast check out & proceed to Bikaner visit Bikaner fort. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.description:
